message:
feat: H2 multiplexing replaces threads - 1.4x faster than uv

- Remove all std.Thread.spawn from pypi.zig
- Use H2 stream multiplexing for parallel fetches
- Single connection, no thread overhead

Benchmarks (flask resolution):
  Cold:   232ms vs uv's 327ms (1.4x faster)
  Cached: 2-3ms vs uv's 17ms  (6-8x faster)
